summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Password Change feature. All backend API tests passed (9/9). Frontend UI tests passed - full E2E flow verified including admin login, password change dialog, logout, login with new password, and non-admin 403 protection.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with salih.karagoz/salih123 returns 200 with token
Backend: GET /api/users returns list of all users (4 users)
Backend: PUT /api/users/{user_id} allows admin to update user fields (name, email, role)
Backend: PUT /api/users/{user_id} with password field updates password hash
Backend: User can login with new password after admin changes it
Backend: Old password no longer works after password change
Backend: PUT /api/users/{user_id} returns 403 for non-admin users
Backend: Empty password field doesn't change password
Backend: Updating other fields doesn't affect password
Backend: Unauthenticated requests return 401
Frontend: Login page loads correctly with PIR GRAIN & PULSES branding
Frontend: Admin login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Settings page accessible via sidebar navigation
Frontend: Users tab shows all 4 users with correct data
Frontend: Key icon (KeyRound) visible for each user in Actions column
Frontend: Clicking key icon opens Change Password dialog
Frontend: Dialog shows correct title 'Change Password' and user name
Frontend: Password input field accepts input
Frontend: Change Password button submits form
Frontend: Success toast 'Password changed for [username]' appears
Frontend: Logout functionality works
Frontend: Login with new password works
Frontend: Non-admin user sees 'Only admins can update users' error toast when trying to change password
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin password change feature fully tested and working. Backend PUT /api/users/{user_id} endpoint correctly handles password changes with admin role check (403 for non-admins). Frontend Settings > Users tab has key icon for each user that opens Change Password dialog. All passwords have been reset to original values after testing.

admin_password_change.frontend_ui: Key icon in Users tab opens dialog
admin_password_change.error_toast: Shows 'Only admins can update users' for non-admins
